# Ailovanta Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] API
- [ ] Node client
- [ ] Dashboard / UI
- [ ] Tests / CI
- [ ] Developer tooling

## Public/private boundary

- [ ] This change belongs in the public repository.
- [ ] This change does not add credentials, model weights, private datasets, runtime databases, or user logs.
- [ ] This change does not add core network coordination logic that belongs in Ailovanta Core.

## Local checks

- [ ] `python validate.py`
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`

## Notes

Add screenshots, logs, or follow-up tasks if useful.
